hero.headline:
39 Years of Relaxation Delivered to
Your Door
hero.subheadline: From hot tubs and pools to game rooms and saunas, the Grand Strand's most trusted relaxation experts have helped thousands of families transform their homes. Visit our showroom or let us come to you.

services.label: Our Collections
services.headline: Everything You Need to<br class="hidden md:block"> Relax and Play
services.subtitle: From backyard escapes to game night headquarters, we carry premium products and provide expert service for every corner of your home.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: As a nationally recognized Hot Spring dealer, we offer top-of-the-line spas with expert guidance to find your perfect model. Delivery and installation included.

cards.title: Swimming Pools
cards.description: Inground and above-ground pool sales and installation. From design consultation to final setup, we handle every step of bringing your dream pool to life.

cards.title: Swim Spas & Saunas
cards.description: Versatile swim spas for exercise and relaxation, plus premium saunas for the ultimate home wellness experience. See them in our showroom.

cards.title: Spa & Pool Service
cards.description: Professional maintenance and repair from experienced technicians who respond promptly. We diagnose and resolve issues to keep your investment running perfectly.

cards.title: Billiards & Game Rooms
cards.description: Pool tables, shuffleboards, foosball, air hockey, and more. Complete game room solutions with expert setup, delivery, and ongoing service.

cards.title: Water Care & Supplies
cards.description: Full line of chemicals, accessories, and professional water testing. We keep your spa or pool water balanced, safe, and crystal clear year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Your Path to the Perfect Backyard

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Explore our fully-loaded showroom in Myrtle Beach. Try hot tubs, browse pools, and play on game tables. Our relaxation experts will answer every question — no pressure, ever.

steps.title: We Design Your Space
steps.description: Our team plans every detail, from product selection to placement. We handle delivery, installation, and setup so you don't have to worry about a thing.

steps.title: Start Relaxing
steps.description: Your new hot tub, pool, or game room is ready to enjoy. Plus, our service team is always here for maintenance, water care, and anything you need down the road.

about.label: Why the Grand Strand Trusts Us
about.headline: Nearly 40 Years of Helping Families Relax
about.description: Since 1987, Elko Spas, Billiards & Pools has been Myrtle Beach's go-to destination for relaxation and recreation. We built our reputation on three simple promises: premium products at fair prices, a pressure-free shopping experience, and educating every customer so they make the best choice for their family. With a 4.9-star rating across 719+ reviews and national awards for retail excellence, we've earned the trust of thousands of Grand Strand families.

features.title: Award-Winning Dealership
features.description: Nationally recognized Hot Spring Dealer of the Year with multiple Gold Dealer awards and the prestigious 2024 AQUA 100 honor.

features.title: Pressure-Free Shopping
features.description: We educate, never pressure. Visit our showroom, ask questions, and take your time. Our relaxation experts are here to help, not sell.

features.title: Full-Service Support
features.description: From your first visit through years of ownership, our service department is here with responsive technicians, water care, and expert maintenance.

pricing.headline: Fair Prices on Premium Products.
pricing.subtitle: Every product is carefully researched to meet our strict quality standards. Visit our showroom for current pricing and seasonal promotions.

guarantee.headline: Our "Relax With Confidence" Promise
guarantee.description: Every product we sell meets our strict quality standards, and every installation is backed by our experienced team. If your service visit doesn't meet your expectations, we come back and make it right at no extra charge. That's been our promise since 1987, and it's why 719+ families have given us a 4.9-star rating.

faqs.question: Can I try the hot tubs before I buy?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our Myrtle Beach showroom has a full collection of hot tubs, swim spas, and more on display. We encourage you to visit, sit in the models, and take your time. Our relaxation experts will answer every question without any pressure.

faqs.question: Do you handle delivery and installation?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle everything from start to finish. Our team manages delivery, installation, and setup for hot tubs, pools, swim spas, saunas, and game room equipment. We make sure everything is running perfectly before we leave.

faqs.question: What brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We are a nationally recognized Hot Spring spa dealer and carry only premium, carefully vetted brands across all our product lines. Every item in our showroom meets strict quality standards. Visit us to see the full collection.

faqs.question: Do you offer service and repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, our dedicated service department handles maintenance, repairs, and water care for hot tubs and pools. Our experienced technicians respond promptly to diagnose and resolve any issues. We also carry a full line of water care products and offer professional water testing.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Myrtle Beach, the Grand Strand, Horry County, and surrounding areas of South Carolina. Whether you need a new spa delivered or a pool serviced, our team covers the entire Grand Strand region.

testimonials.name: Anne K.
testimonials.text: So easy to maintain and feels so good on your skin. And the service they give you is outstanding! We couldn't be happier with our Elko experience.

testimonials.name: Gordon T.
testimonials.text: Quality products, competitive pricing, and great people. Elko has been our go-to for years and they never disappoint. The showroom is worth the visit alone.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: As soon as you walk through the door, you will be greeted by an Elko staff member who, through their actions and energy, let you know customer service is a top priority. No pressure, just genuine help.

contact.headline:
Ready to Start
Relaxing?
contact.subtitle: Visit our Myrtle Beach showroom or call for a free consultation. No pressure, no commitments — just friendly experts ready to help you find the perfect fit.
